message: Hey everyone. I'm pumped today about our flash sale
You know it's been 56 years since the Beatles released Abbey Road right? My favourite album
56 years already?? Wow that makes me feel old...
Indeed! We're celebrating today by promoting a flash sale on retro items from 1969

Welcome to Bezs Beatles Day, remember communication is key to diagnose the problem.

 *Access game links by pressing the Uptime Labs Logo in the top right of the screen*
 *Use `/incident` to create an incident record*

Once you're ready just click start to begin
We're a step closer to allowing folks to pay for items from the 1960s with Bitcoin thanks to Daniel!
Think of it like time travelling!
Wow good work Daniel! Looking forward to seeing it in action in prod
How's the test-driven development going?
TDDs going well. We are as solid as a rock! Though don't ask me what the Liskov Substitution Principle is...
erm - funny you should say that Daniel, I'm just testing my checkout service change in prod and I can't complete the payment - something's up
I hope my checkout service change is all good. Can someone check its not just me? And before you ask, yes I've cleared my cookies
Sorry Daniel it's not looking good on my end either
Uh oh...here we go again
@girish.kumar-zomato.com can you "Size up the Issue" please and keep us informed
From what I can see it looks like we are still getting orders through
Get this sorted ASAP!!!
did we make any changes in infra, any serivce deployments, configuration changes?
:star: Check changes done to the platform
Just got a message from my cousin in London, she can't buy any of the new Beatles merch either. Says her payment failed.
@bob are customers reporting any issues?
I'm noticing the failures seem concentrated in Europe. Looks like the UK is particularly affected.
:star: Asking questions to validate impact of the problem
Give me a second, I'll get the detailed info on each of the changes made today
Hope this helps: https://uptime-labs.atlassian.net/wiki/external/OGU1YjE2MmE4ZmI4NGFkMjgzNzEwZGVkYjlmNzgwNWY
Any updates on the investigation?
Yes, we're seeing a 100% payment failure rate for UK customers in the last 15 minutes, with no successful transactions from that region.
@tinus we are investigate.
Thanks for the update, let me know if you need any infrastructure context or support.
when did the issue started exactly, do we have the timeline?
:star: Facts over opinion
The payment failures for UK customers started exactly 15 minutes ago, with no successful transactions since then.
checkout service was deployed 15mins ago, can we revert it?
I will rollback my checkout change right away
:star: Restoration over root cause analysis
:bulb: Declare an incident.
Rollback complete!
Hmm, customer reports are still coming in at the same rate
The failure pattern hasn't changed - still 100% failure in the UK
can we also revert payments service? this was deployed 5mins ago
Something else must be causing this
We need this fixed!
The new code isn't being invoked yet, can I investigate a bit more.
can you give more context?
We're still seeing a 100% payment failure rate in the UK, and rolling back checkout service didn't help.
I noticed Daniel's recent change touched some shared libraries used in UK payment flows, which might be worth a closer look.
@daniel can we revert payments service as well?
Fine if you insist, I'll rollback
Rolling back my Bitcoin payment service change now
Rollback complete. Might take a few minutes to stabilise
Did that fix it?
:bulb: To complete this drill, ask the engineering team to verify the payment service is working, and check with Bob if UK customer payments have recovered.
we are investigating issues related to customers not able to make payments in UK region.
How many customers or transactions are currently impacted? Need numbers. Also, what is the estimated financial loss per hour?
@bob can you check if customers are still reporting issues?
Looking into it now... Metrics seem to be improving!
:star: Cross check resolution with stakeholders
Customer payments appear to be back up and processing normally
@shay / @daniel can you check if metrics are up?
:star: Cross checking resolution with team
I'm standing by to run a test transaction to confirm everything is working internally.
I'll check the service logs now to verify if the payment flows are healthy on our end.
we have fixed the issue. We are checking the impact.
:star: Confirm resolution with the business
Confirm that payments are processing and revenue is coming in again. I need concrete numbers on lost orders and financial impact ASAP.
@daniel can we figure out estimated orders we lost during the incident?
I'll pull the logs for the affected time window and estimate the number of failed orders. I'll update you as soon as I have the numbers.
getting this.
@daniel when did we deploy payments serivce? can you give me exact timeline?
We deployed the payments service update about 35 minutes ago. I can pull the exact deployment timestamp from our CI logs if you need it.
I need confirmation: are payments now being processed successfully? Quantify the number of failed transactions and the estimated revenue loss during the outage.
@daniel where are we on failed transactions?
I'm still analyzing the logs for the incident window. I should have an estimate of failed transactions shortly and will share the numbers as soon as they're ready.
:star: Manage actions and timings
@bez we are getting the numbers, will update you once we have.
Maybe Bob must be able to pull up this info as well
@bob can you help us get the failed transactions, some estimate?
I can pull a rough estimate from our customer support tickets and payment provider dashboards. Give me a few minutes to gather the numbers.
Understood. Prioritize speed—update me the moment you have the figures.
Incident has been resolved.
Great work, everyone! I'll run a final test transaction to make sure everything is stable on our side.
I don't think the Beatles would've anticipated cryptocurrency so let's keep it that way for now
